posts.text:
LATER TODAY at 7pm ET/4pm PT: TYT’s Power Panel is back!  

Watch Sen. @ninaturner and Rep. @mtgreenee take on the stories of the week. Two powerful voices. One hour of intense political discussion. What will they agree on? Disagree on? Find common ground on? Tune in to find out! 🔥 Moderated by @cenkuygur! #tytlive

Friday at 7pm ET/4pm PT: TYT’s Power Panel is back!  

Watch Sen. @ninaturner and Rep. @mtgreenee take on the stories of the week. Two powerful voices. One hour of intense political discussion. What will they agree on? Disagree on? Find common ground on? Tune in to find out! 🔥 Moderated by @cenkuygur! #tytlive

Even Fox Business is trashing Trump's terrible economy! 😬

Video

Krystal Ball on the Democratic Tea Party emerging and some of the great populist candidates to vote for in the upcoming elections. Watch ➡️ piped.video/6qLdMrd7PKU?si=lcYl…

Video

Nine Americans have been killed in Israel over the last three years. Does our government even care? @cenkuygur asks on @TuckerCarlson. Watch Cenk's breakdown of their over 2-hour conversation here: go.tyt.com/cenkontc

Video

.@cenkuygur and @TuckerCarlson agree that Bari Weiss "has only been for cancel culture" and that she failed her way up to her current position as head of CBS News. "You're talking about arresting Americans for disagreeing with another government." go.tyt.com/cenkontc

Video

Sign our Operation Consequences pledges! If a politician takes money from AIPAC and endless war, this is a pledge NOT to vote for them, EVER!!!

🔗 go.tyt.com/consequences

.@cenkuygur joined @TuckerCarlson for an over 2-hour discussion on Israel, war, Epstein, and much more! 

🔗 below + tune into #tytlive at 6pm ET/3pm PT today to watch Cenk break down his discussion with Tucker and why he went on his show! 👉 piped.video/OOs0Kpj0g1w?si=kJG9…

Video

"Our country is falling apart..." @AnaKasparian on Trump's disastrous first full year back in office. #tytlive

Video

"We must straighten our backs to fight for our freedom." -MLK
